narratives.evidence_quote: दुनिया जंग के ढेर पर बैठी है. एक दर्जन से ज्यादा देशों में तनाव है... कुल मिलाकर दुनिया बारूद के ढेर पर बैठी है.
narratives.reasoning: The text repeatedly uses hyperbolic and alarming language ('sitting on a pile of gunpowder', 'world sitting on a heap of war') to evoke fear about widespread, multi-front military conflicts and global instability.

narratives.evidence_quote: उससे लग रहा है कि इजरायल, मिडिल ईस्ट का नया बादशाह बन सकता है.
narratives.reasoning: The text makes a speculative prediction about a future geopolitical outcome, forecasting that Israel could become the new dominant power ('new king') in the Middle East based on the current pace of its actions.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: There is a real possibility that nuclear weapons will be employed
subnarratives.evidence_quote: नॉर्थ कोरिया में बाढ़ के हालात हैं ऐसे में फिलहाल वहां का सनकी तानाशाह चुप है, लेकिन हालात संभलते ही वो क्या फैसला लेगा इस पर सबकी निगाहें टिकी हुई हैं.
subnarratives.reasoning: The text refers to North Korea's 'mad dictator' and speculates on what decision he will make once the flood situation improves, evoking anxiety and fear about potential aggressive actions, which in the context of North Korea strongly implies the threat of nuclear weapons.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: दुनिया जंग के ढेर पर बैठी है. एक दर्जन से ज्यादा देशों में तनाव है... कुल मिलाकर दुनिया बारूद के ढेर पर बैठी है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement broadly amplifies war-related fears by painting a picture of a world sitting on a 'pile of gunpowder' with tensions in over a dozen countries, supporting the parent narrative but not fitting any specific subnarrative definition provided.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस अब यूक्रेन पर पहले से तेज प्रहार कर रहा है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement speculates on the current and future intensity of the Russia-Ukraine war, suggesting an escalation ('तेज प्रहार'), which fits the parent narrative of speculating on war outcomes but does not match the specific definitions about army collapse or loss of territory.
